summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.supervisor; public class Bootstrap { private String sourcePath; private String targetPath; private String action; private String statePath; public Bootstrap() {} public String getSourcePath() { return sourcePath; } public void setSourcePath(String sourcePath) { this.sourcePath = sourcePath; } public String getTargetPath() { return targetPath; } public void setTargetPath(String targetPath) { this.targetPath = targetPath; } public String getAction() { return action; } public void setAction(String action) { this.action = action; } public String getStatePath() { return statePath; } public void setStatePath(String statePath) { this.statePath = statePath; } }
